text: To safely enter a compartment where CO2 has been released from a fixed extinguishing system, you should:

options.text: Wear a generic particulate dust filter mask
Run a hand-held exhaust blower for five minutes first
Wait ten minutes for gas settlement before walking in

explanation: Carbon dioxide (CO2) displaces oxygen and can create a hazardous atmosphere for breathing. Entering a compartment where CO2 has been released requires a self-contained breathing apparatus (SCBA) to ensure a safe supply of breathable air.
